title: Delete obsolete packages
description:
Delete packages that are no longer needed after the rearchitecture:

- internal/pool/ (~600 LOC) - replaced by wave runner
- internal/swarm/ (~200 LOC) - Go does orchestration
- internal/parallel/ (~350 LOC) - multi-epic is external
- internal/checkpoint/ (~150 LOC) - branch is the checkpoint
- internal/verify/ (~700 LOC) - moves to wrap-up phase
- internal/taskrunner/ (~150 LOC) - pool adapter no longer needed
- internal/context/dependencies.go - file-level conflict detection no longer needed

Remove all imports of these packages from engine and run.go. Ensure the project compiles and all remaining tests pass.
acceptance_criteria: Listed packages deleted. No dangling imports. Project compiles. All remaining tests pass.
closed_reason: Deleted pool, swarm, parallel, checkpoint, verify, taskrunner packages and dependencies.go.
